articles.title: NASA's Webb detects methane and strange chemistry on interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS
articles.description: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope has uncovered unusual chemistry in interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS, including the first direct detection of methane on a visitor from another star system.
